videos.title: The Pursuit
videos.headline: Something fell.
videos.description: The Container streaks through space, glowing with golden light. Behind it, darkness spreads like silence.

videos.title: Atmospheric Overheat
videos.headline: It burned on the way down.
videos.description: Entering Earth's atmosphere. The Container burns but holds. The Ink won't stop.

videos.title: Impact
videos.headline: The forest remembered.
videos.description: Golden light explodes through the forest. Trees bend. The ground shakes. Something has arrived.

videos.title: The Silence
videos.headline: Then — nothing.
videos.description: The forest holds its breath. The Container sits in its crater, glowing softly. Particles drift upward like dying embers.

videos.title: The Wrongness
videos.headline: Almost the same.
videos.description: The same forest. The same light. But something has shifted. In the deep background — dark nodes, perfectly still.
